items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.raw_content: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
items.ai_summary: OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.5，更快速、更强大，适用于编码、研究和数据分析。

items.title: GPT-5.5 System Card
items.ai_summary: OpenAI发布了GPT-5.5系统卡，详细介绍了该模型的能力、安全性和性能。

items.title: Automations
items.raw_content: Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.
items.ai_summary: 学习如何在Codex中使用计划和触发器自动化任务，无需手动操作即可创建报告、摘要和重复工作流。

items.title: Top 10 uses for Codex at work
items.raw_content: Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.
items.ai_summary: 探索Codex在职场中的10个实用用例，包括自动化任务、创建交付物以及跨工具、文件和流程处理输入输出。

items.title: Plugins and skills
items.raw_content: Learn how to use Codex plugins and skills to connect tools, access data, and follow repeatable workflows to automate tasks and improve results.
items.ai_summary: 学习如何使用Codex插件和技能连接工具、访问数据并遵循可重复工作流，以自动化任务并改进结果。

items.title: Working with Codex
items.raw_content: Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.
items.ai_summary: 了解如何设置Codex工作区、创建线程和项目、管理文件，并通过逐步指导开始完成任务。

items.title: Codex settings
items.raw_content: Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow.
items.ai_summary: 学习如何配置Codex设置，包括个性化、详细级别和权限，以顺利运行任务并自定义工作流。

items.title: What is Codex?
items.raw_content: Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.
items.ai_summary: 了解Codex如何通过自动化任务、连接工具和生成文档、仪表盘等实际输出来超越聊天功能。

items.title: How to get started with Codex
items.raw_content: Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.
items.ai_summary: 学习如何通过设置项目、创建线程和完成第一个任务来开始使用Codex，提供逐步指导。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.raw_content: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.
items.ai_summary: 探索GPT-5.5生物漏洞赏金计划：一项红队挑战，旨在发现生物安全风险的通用越狱方法，奖励高达25,000美元。
